WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 3 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on the top additional reel and the bottom additional reel of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: Any Wild symbols appearing on the top additional reel and the bottom additional reel will start with 3 Wild symbols stacking on top of each other.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and there is 2 or 3 Wild symbol stacking on top of each other, the Wild symbol on the top of the stack will destroy itself in the next round.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: If a Wild symbol at the top additional reel is in the same column as another Wild symbol at the bottom additional reel, all symbols in that column (excluding Scatter symbol) will be transformed into Wild symbols and will stay on the reels until either Wild symbol at the top and/or bottom additional reel is completely used up.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: Any unused Wild symbol on the reels will stay on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature or until it is involved in any win.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
WildCoasterPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: During any spins, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .

WildCoasterRule.Rule1_1: Wild Coaster is a 6-reel, 4-row video slot (with an additional reel on the top and bottom of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wild symbols that may expand on the reels.

Rule1_2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{4096} ways - %{20736} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule1_2.comment: ${minChip} ${maxChip} will be replaced with game specific
Rule1_2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

WildCoasterRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
